LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HAFED TAAM AND YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION STRICKEN BECAUSE IT IS NOT PROPERLY SUBSCRIBED. (SEE IN RE MARRIAGE OF REESE & GUY (1999) 73 CAL.APP.4TH, 1214, 1222. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING MALICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HAFED TAAM AND YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. Appearances: Steven R. Jacobsen, Law Offices of Steven R. Jacobsen, (510) 465-1500 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; John A. Noda, Esq. of Kern, Noda, Devine & Segal (415) 474-1900, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for Summary Adjudication is granted. Plaintiff's declaration stricken because it is not properly subscribed. (See In re Marriage of Reese & Guy (1999) 73 Cal.App.4th, 1214, 1222. Plaintiff fails to raise a triable issue of fact regarding malice. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Notice Of Motion To Compel Supplemental Answers To Form Interrogatories; And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of P/A; And Declaratin Of John A. Noda, Esq. In Support Thereof.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John A. Noda, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.
Steven R. Jacobsen, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Maria Joya

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Defendant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.'s motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve supplemental responses.
Monetary sanctions in the amount of $360 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION. Compliance within 30 days. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Continued To Jan-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
